name: Kang
description: Nathaniel Richards, a 31st-century scholar who discovered time travel technology, became Kang the Conqueror, a being who has conquered civilizations across all of recorded history. Unlike other villains who seek power in a single timeline, Kang's threat is multiversal: infinite variants of himself wage wars across branching realities. His technological mastery over temporal mechanics makes him uniquely dangerous, he has already won every possible future.
